introSection: Time Travel is a wooden roller coaster located at Hot Go Park - Happy Jungle World in China. Built by Martin & Vleminckx and designed by The Gravity Group, LLC, the ride opened in September 2014.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Time Travel contains two tunnels, but does not contain any inversions.

fullText:
Time Travel is a wooden roller coaster located at Hot Go Park - Happy Jungle World in China. Built by Martin & Vleminckx and designed by The Gravity Group, LLC, the ride opened in September 2014.

Time Travel contains two tunnels, but does not contain any inversions.
